tagline: Authentic, personalized dentistry rooted in Sonoma County.
seoDescription: Leslie Jue, DDS at SoCo Dental Studio in Santa Rosa, CA offers cosmetic, preventive, restorative and implant dentistry. With 36+ years of experience and a family legacy of care, Dr. Jue and the SoCo team deliver gentle, modern dentistry. Call (707) 537-1904.
heroHeading: Gentle, Expert Dental Care in Santa Rosa
heroSubheading: Dr. Leslie Jue brings more than 36 years of compassionate, comprehensive dentistry to SoCo Dental Studio, treating the person, not just the teeth.
highlights: 36+ years of dental experience caring for Sonoma County families
Cosmetic care including veneers, dental bonding, and professional teeth whitening
Dental implants planned with CBCT imaging for precise, comfortable placement
Former Clinical Oral Healthcare Instructor at UOP's Arthur A. Dugoni School of Dentistry
Part of a multi-generational family of dentists serving Santa Rosa and Windsor
Comfort-focused visits with digital scanning, blankets, and headphones
aboutHeading: A Family Legacy of Dentistry in Sonoma County
aboutBody: Dr. Leslie Jue has been delivering dental care since 1987, building a career grounded in compassion, education, and community connection. A graduate of UC Davis with a degree in physiology, she earned her DDS from the University of the Pacific, Arthur A. Dugoni School of Dentistry, where she later spent five years teaching as a Clinical Oral Healthcare Instructor, mentoring the next generation of dentists in comprehensive care.

Dr. Jue practices at SoCo Dental Studio, a Santa Rosa office that blends generations of dental experience with a fresh, down-to-earth approach. Dentistry runs in the family: her daughter, Dr. Jacqueline Payne, is a local orthodontist, and the practice is now led by third-generation dentist Dr. Michael Louie. Together the family operates dental offices across Santa Rosa and Windsor, combining artistry, science, and modern technology under one roof.

Beyond the chair, Dr. Jue is known for her commitment to the community, including outreach during Sonoma County's wildfire and pandemic responses. Patients consistently describe a positive, welcoming atmosphere and a friendly, professional team focused on clear communication and gentle, attentive care.
servicesHeading: Comprehensive Dentistry, From Cleanings to Smile Makeovers

services.title: Cosmetic Dentistry
services.description: Veneers, dental bonding, enameloplasty, and full smile makeovers to address chips, gaps, stains, and misalignment for a natural-looking result.

services.title: Teeth Whitening
services.description: Professional in-office whitening that lifts stains from coffee, wine, and daily wear, plus dentist-approved take-home kits tailored to you.

services.title: Dental Implants
services.description: Single-tooth implants planned with CBCT imaging for precise placement, with bone grafting available to support long-lasting, natural-feeling results.

services.title: Restorative Dentistry
services.description: Crowns, fillings, root canal therapy, and full-mouth rehabilitation to restore comfort, function, and the health of your smile.

services.title: Preventive & Hygiene Care
services.description: Routine cleanings, exams, sealants, and periodontal care to keep your teeth and gums healthy and catch issues early.

services.title: Emergency Dentistry
services.description: Prompt care for dental emergencies so you can get out of pain and back to your day.

testimonials.quote: I appreciate the positive atmosphere maintained at the Leslie Jue DDS office. The entire staff is friendly and professional.
testimonials.author: Carol Wolfe

testimonials.quote: All experiences have been amazing - from the quickness of being seen, to the quality of care I've received, to the friendly and sweet assistants!
testimonials.author: Farrah

testimonials.quote: The whole team was super nice and very welcoming. I appreciate how calm and gentle Dr. Louie was to my little one.
testimonials.author: Yoslin Alaniz

notes:
CONFIRMED — strong business-specific facts cross-checked across multiple sources; phone (707) 537-1904 and address 55 Mission Cir, Suite 106, Santa Rosa CA 95409 match across the practice site, Yelp, Waze, and chamber listing. This is the right business.

SOURCES:
- Practice site (live, NOT dead): https://www.socodentalstudio.com/ , /about , /service-categories/cosmetic-dentistry , /services/dental-implants
- Yelp: https://www.yelp.com/biz/leslie-jue-dds-santa-rosa (19 reviews; blocked 403 so star value not captured from Yelp)
- Birdeye: https://reviews.birdeye.com/jue-leslie-dds-165655284712218 (4.9 stars, 69 reviews — used for rating)
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/LeslieJueDDS/
- Santa Rosa Metro Chamber: https://www.santarosametrochamber.com/directory/leslie-jue-payne-dds-doctor-michael-louie-dds/
- Healthgrades/WebMD/US News listings (existence confirmed, not deep-fetched)

CAVEATS / UNVERIFIED:
- INVISALIGN: The task context assumed Invisalign/clear aligners. SoCo Dental Studio's cosmetic page does NOT list Invisalign or clear aligners; orthodontics is handled by a related but SEPARATE practice (Dr. Jacqueline Payne, orthodontist, Dr. Jue's daughter). I deliberately OMITTED Invisalign from services to avoid asserting an unverified offering. Do not add it without confirmation.
- FOUNDING YEAR: 'Est. 1987' is derived from a search snippet stating Dr. Jue has been 'delivering outstanding dental care since 1987' — this is her career start, not necessarily the founding year of SoCo Dental Studio (which appears to be a newer/rebranded studio now led by Dr. Michael Louie). Treat 1987 as Dr. Jue's career start; the SoCo Studio brand itself looks recent (Webflow site, CDN assets dated 2025).
- Note SoCo Dental Studio is led/owned by Dr. Michael Louie (third-generation dentist); Dr. Leslie Jue is an associate dentist there. Since the outreach target is Dr. Jue specifically, copy centers on her but accurately reflects the shared practice. Dr. Gregory Baird is also listed as a dentist.
- HOURS: Site states Monday–Thursday 8 AM–5 PM. Fri/Sat/Sun marked Closed (inferred from the absence of listed hours — reasonable but Friday closure not explicitly stated as 'closed').
- RATING: 4.9/69 from Birdeye. A Demandforce listing showed 5.0/439 but Demandforce reviews are self-collected; chose Birdeye as more conservative/independent. Yelp count is 19 (rating unconfirmed due to 403).
- TESTIMONIALS: Verbatim from Birdeye (Carol Wolfe, Farrah, Yoslin Alaniz). Minor punctuation/spelling normalized ('Iv' -> 'I've'). Yoslin's quote praises Dr. Louie (same office) rather than Dr. Jue specifically.
- PHOTOS: URLs are from the practice's own Webflow CDN (DSC/IMG-prefixed = their own photography). I EXCLUDED two AdobeStock-named files (stock imagery). Have not visually inspected each image; they are labeled office/team/people-type assets on the About page but visual content unverified.
- SOCIAL: Facebook confirmed. Instagram and Google Business Profile URLs not located/verified — left empty rather than guessing.
- juesmiles.com (TLS cert error) and todaysbestdentists.com listings exist and may carry an older/legacy bio; not fetched. The 'since 1987' and family-legacy details should be re-verified directly with the practice before publishing.
